message:
feat(runtime,server): wire CONFIG SET maxclients and busy-reply-threshold

- maxclients: Add ServerState.max_clients, CONFIG SET/GET support,
  fr-server reads runtime value instead of compile-time const
- busy-reply-threshold / lua-time-limit: Add ServerState.command_time_budget_ms,
  CONFIG SET/GET support, replaces COMMAND_TIME_BUDGET_MS const
- Both parameters now take effect immediately on CONFIG SET

Closes: frankenredis-as1, frankenredis-w1m

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
